place: Chaweng Noi, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Four-Bedroom Hillside Villa with Bay Views - Chaweng Noi
note: Daily housekeeping · private Thai chef · airport transfers
blurb: A four-bedroom villa set high in the hills above Chaweng Noi, angled to catch the bay and the wide sweep of Koh Samui below — contemporary open-plan living that folds out to an infinity pool and sun terrace, a private spa and massage room, and a resident housekeeper and Thai chef, sleeping up to eight just minutes from the beach.
detail:
Perched on the hillside above Chaweng Noi, this four-bedroom villa is built around its outlook — nearly every room opens toward the bay and the green ridgelines that fall away to the sea. Clean modern lines, timber accents and glass walls keep the architecture quiet and let the view do the work, while an infinity pool runs to the edge of the sun terrace, with loungers, a shaded dining sala and beanbags set out for slow afternoons in the sun.

Inside, an airy open-plan living and dining room flows into a fully equipped kitchen with a breakfast counter and wine cellar. The master suite pairs a king bed with a walk-in closet and a bathtub framed by the seascape, and three further bedrooms — a second king and two twins — each come with their own ensuite, one looking over the pool and another onto a private tropical garden. A dedicated spa room is set aside for couples' massages and treatments.

Day-to-day life is handled by a resident team: daily housekeeping and a Thai chef who prepares breakfast, lunch and dinner, with a welcome drink on arrival and roundtrip airport transfers included. The beaches, restaurants and nightlife of Chaweng and Chaweng Noi are a short drive downhill, leaving the villa itself calm and private above it all.

features.l: Infinity pool & sun terrace with bay views
Sea views over Chaweng Noi & the bay
